hero.headline:
See How Crowded Travel
Destinations Really Get
hero.description: PackedPlaces.com visualizes tourist crowdedness for 700+ destinations worldwide, week by week, powered by school holiday data and major events from 100+ countries.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Text: We collect school holiday schedules from 127 regions using three data providers: hand-curated dates, the OpenHolidaysAPI, and the date-holidays library.
howItWorks.step2Text: Over 6,000 travel patterns connect source regions to destinations, weighted by real tourism statistics from UNWTO, Eurostat, and national tourism authorities.
howItWorks.step3Text: Over 50 major events — from the FIFA World Cup and Olympics to Oktoberfest and Carnival — are layered on top, boosting destination scores during event weeks.
howItWorks.step4Text: Raw traffic scores are divided by each destination's capacity — accounting for category and month-by-month peak season data. Demand is dampened by weather patterns like monsoons, extreme heat, and cyclone seasons. The result: how packed a place feels.

features.title: Features
features.crowdednessText: Measures congestion relative to capacity. A packed ski village scores higher than a busy metropolis.
features.hemisphereText: Each destination has month-by-month peak season data reflecting real-world conditions — monsoons, dry/wet seasons, extreme heat, typhoons, and polar winters. Demand drops sharply during off-season months.
features.categoriesText: Ski, beach, city, island, safari, desert, tropical, lake, nature, cultural, and mountain — each with tuned capacity.
features.boostText: 1.5x multiplier during school breaks captures the surge in travel demand when families hit the road.
features.timelineText: Scrub or animate through every week of the year to see crowdedness shift in real time.
features.providersText: Three cascading providers — manual, OpenHolidaysAPI, and date-holidays — ensure global school holiday coverage.
features.eventsText: Olympics, FIFA World Cup, Oktoberfest, Carnival, Grand Slams, and more — major events that drive millions of visitors are tracked and shown on the map.

data.title: Data & Methodology
data.populationText: Eurostat, US Census, ABS, UN World Population Prospects
data.tourismText: UNWTO Compendium, Eurostat overnight stays, NTTO, JNTO
data.eventsDataText: 50+ recurring and one-time events including Olympics, FIFA World Cup, festivals, and Grand Slams
data.geographyText: Coordinates, per-month peak season profiles, category assignment
data.capacityDescription: Each category has a peak and off-peak capacity. A monthly attractiveness model interpolates between them based on each destination's peak months, accounting for monsoons, dry/wet seasons, and other weather patterns.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: PackedPlaces.com is fully open source. Browse the code, report issues, or contribute new regions and destinations.
